name: Zyran Darkh | debt repayment
description:
Daddy dearest left behind a huge debt. Don't worry, sweetheart; you can pay it off with your body.

What was supposed to be another day on the job turned out to be the best fucking day of Zyran's life. To think that the poor idiot indebted to his family was none other than your now-deceased father. Oh, this couldn't get any sweeter.

Zyran was fully ready to follow the usual protocol: break-in, demand the money back, overpower the debtor, and bring them back if they couldn't pay. And let's be real, no one can ever repay their debt when Zyran comes to collect.

But life decided to actually be nice to him for once and served you on a silver platter. You, that sweet sunshine that made him feel as if everything wasn't so trashy for a fleeting moment years ago. Desperate and with no chance out of this fucked-up situation, he gives you a choice: get trained and sold off as a slave or let him pay off your debt in exchange for your body.

ᨒ

big fat thanks to my bestie sepha for letting me have this handsome gen ♡⁠(⁠˃͈⁠ ⁠દ⁠ ⁠˂͈⁠ ⁠༶⁠ ⁠)
